prompt: Create a vertical 2:3 cinematic anime-style portrait of Hinata Hyuga from Naruto, shown in a close-up three-quarter view from the chest up, with long flowing dark indigo-purple hair and straight bangs blowing dramatically across the frame. Her face is intentionally covered by a large centered opaque square censor block in deep muted purple, hiding the eyes, nose, and mouth. She wears a pale lavender-and-white shinobi jacket with a high collar, a visible Leaf Village metal forehead-protector plate worn around the neck, dark mesh undershirt, and a circular sleeve emblem on the upper arm. The scene is filled with glowing violet-white petals, soft particles, and streaks of light swirling around her hair, with strong backlighting from the upper left creating glossy highlights and a dreamy ethereal atmosphere. Use a cool purple-blue color palette, high-detail semi-realistic anime rendering, shallow depth of field, luminous bloom, motion-blurred hair strands, and soft bokeh. Add subtle vertical Japanese text near the upper right reading 日向雛田 with a small Leaf Village symbol beneath it. No extra characters, no watermark, no modern objects, maintain the large square face obstruction exactly in the center.
